## Task type

- [ ] Existing project scan
- [ ] New page or module
- [ ] PRD/design parsing
- [ ] Code review
- [ ] Migration or refactor
- [ ] Other

## Did the workflow help?

Describe what H5 Forge did better or worse than your normal AI coding flow.

## Where was it too heavy or too light?

Mention whether the routing, role output, rule-card handling, or validation felt appropriate.

## What should change?

Suggest concrete changes to prompts, references, routing rules, or documentation.
